request.description: Returns public comments preview for one public appeal.
Returns public frontend URLs for sitemap generation.
Returns database-backed homepage content: hero slides, active advertisements, category groups and SEO metadata.
Completes email two-factor login and returns a bearer token.
Creates an appeal draft without Authorization and returns data.guestToken. The test script stores draft_id and guest_draft_token collection variables.
Reads a guest draft by X-Appeal-Draft-Token.
Submits a guest draft by X-Appeal-Draft-Token.
Logs in seeded admin@example.com user and stores auth_token.
Returns all category groups and categories for admin management.
Creates a category and stores admin_category_id.
Updates a category by id.
Deletes a category by id.
Returns all news posts including drafts and archived posts.
Creates a news post and stores admin_news_id.

request.description: Updates a news post by id.

Returns all public appeal records including non-public drafts.
Creates a public appeal and stores admin_appeal_id.
Updates a public appeal by id.
Deletes a public appeal by id.
Returns submitted appeal drafts waiting for moderation.
Returns one submitted draft with contact fields, attachment metadata and moderation events.
Requests changes from the appeal author and moves the draft to needs_changes.
Rejects a submitted draft and stores the rejection reason.
Approves a submitted draft, creates a public appeal and stores moderated_public_appeal_id.
